eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 01:21 PM ON JAN 31, 2026 Effective until 01:36 PM FEB 1, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THE MANSFIELD TEXAS POLICE DEPARTMENT HAS ISSUED AN AMBER ALERT FOR A CHILD ABDUCTION THAT OCCURRED AT MANSFIELD, TEXAS ON 01/30/2026 AT 02:00 AM.  

ABDUCTED WAS EPHRAIM JUAQUIN CARMONA, BI-RACIAL, WHITE AND HISPANIC, MALE, AGE 4. 

SUSPECT VEHICLE is A LIGHT GOLD 2009 TOYOTA COROLLA BEARING TEXAS REGISTRATION 'N' 'J' 'V','5' '5' '3' '6'.  
VEHICLE HAS REAR TINTED WINDOWS AND DAMAGE TO THE FRONT PASSENGER SIDE HOOD. 

SUSPECT is RAYMOND ISAAC CARMONA A HISPANIC, MALE, 20, 5 FEET 5 INCHES TALL, 140 POUNDS, HAS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 
LAST SEEN WEARING A BLACK STOCKING CAP, DARK HOODED SWEATSHIRT, AND BLUE JEANS. 
SUSPECT HAS BEEN KNOWN TO HAVE LONG HAIR IN THE PAST AND TYPICALLY WAS WORN SLICKED BACK. 

VICTIM EPHRAIM JUAQUIN CARMONA is 4 FEET 0 INCHES TALL, 60 POUNDS, HAS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 
VICTIM HAS CURLY HAIR AND BIRTHMARK ON RIGHT CALF. 

RAYMOND CARMONA IS THE SUSPECT IN A POSSIBLE HOMICIDE THAT OCCURRED ON JANUARY 30, 2026 IN MANSFIELD, TEXAS.  THE SUSPECT VEHICLE WAS LAST SEEN IN THE AREA OF BUSINESS 65 AT NORTH THIRD STREET IN OZARK, MISSOURI AT 8:16 A.M. ON JANUARY 31, 2006.  STATEWIDE. 

PLEASE CALL 9 1 1 OR MANSFIELD TEXAS POLICE DEPARTMENT AT 817-473-0211 IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION PERTAINING TO THIS ALERT.
